changes.reason: The global worst charm-pin tail missed the already-enabled extended-VWAP rejection signature by only 0.2008 ES points: actual ES-VWAP distance 26.2008 versus the current 26.0 cap. This is the smallest surgical boundary expansion available and avoids broad ES-VWAP pruning that would damage protected fast extended-VWAP winners.

expected_effect: Target one very narrow MAE improvement: catch or reclassify the -527 charm_pin_pullback_long tail while preserving the fast extended-VWAP winner set. Reject if this removes materially more than the single near-boundary tail, reduces total net profit below 98% of run_001, lowers pnl_per_exposure_hour, or cuts protected fast winners.
label: surgical-extended-vwap-boundary-probe
rationale: The next experiment should not continue throughput pruning. Latest run_026 is slightly worse than run_001 on score, net profit, growth quality, fast trades, average MAE, and pnl/exposure, while the -527 worst MAE remains. The strongest actionable evidence is a surgical veto near-miss: the worst charm_pin_pullback_long trade was inside the enabled extended-VWAP rejection signature on every checked dimension except max VWAP distance, missing by only 0.2008 points. A one-key boundary probe is cleaner than repeating rejected charm-pin tail-box settings or applying broad profile filters that the protected-winner set explicitly warns against.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: charm_pin_pullback_long contributes $1111.1 across 32 VALID_0DTE trades but owns the global -527 MAE. The worst tail had ES-VWAP 26.20, negative VWAP acceleration, pullback-from-high 9.75, rolling-high distance 14.75, no positive move before MAE, and first profit only after 80.3 minutes, while protected extended-VWAP winners show similar extension can resolve quickly.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Charm Pin Early-Progress Tail Classifier
strategy_hypotheses.risk: A static config proxy can still block clean high-extension winners; a path-aware classifier must prove it preserves protected fast extended-VWAP trades.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: charm_pin_pullback_long high-extension or recent-high-rejection entries that fail to print early positive progress after entry.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Reduce charm_pin_pullback_long worst MAE from -527 toward <= -403 while retaining >=90% charm-pin PnL, >=95% protected fast-winner count, total net profit >=98% of run_001, and pnl_per_exposure_hour flat or better.

strategy_plan_reference.market_regime_read: The sample is a high-win-rate, take-profit-only, low-drawdown regime over about 12.3 calendar days. There are no realized loss trades and no slow >=12h trades, so risk is hidden...

new_strategy_ideas.name: Charm Pin Early-Progress Tail Classifier
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Reduce charm_pin_pullback_long worst MAE from -527 toward <= -403 while retaining >=90% charm-pin PnL and >=95% protected fast extended-VWAP winners.

new_strategy_ideas.name: 1DTE Pullback Companion Profile
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Combined 1DTE PnL remains >= current $1305, 1DTE average MAE improves versus -123.9, and total net profit remains >=98% of leader.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Charm Wall Pin Avoid Dormant Activation Probe
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Activated profile has positive standalone PnL or reduces combined charm/pin worst MAE while total net profit remains >=98% of run_001 and protected fast-winner count is not mate...

new_strategy_ideas.name: Pullback Deep-Heat Companion Classifier
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Retain >=90% of pullback_long PnL while improving pullback worst MAE from -403.2 or worse toward <= -300 and keeping total PnL per exposure hour flat or better.
